headline: Woman's 'Healing Era' Instagram Grid Hasn't Changed In 2 Years, She's Been 'Healing' For Awhile
summary: The beige aesthetic remains. The healing may be complete. She's just committed to the grid.
fullBody: Jessica Healing has posted the same beige-toned 'healing era' content for 2 years. 'I'm almost there,' Jessica said. Her friends have started a betting pool on when the 'healed era' will begin. 'I think she's healed,' one friend said. 'She just likes the grid.' Jessica has now announced 'era 2: healing harder.' The beige continues. The healing persists. The aesthetics remain immaculate.
